title: eriogonum ordii
intro: Eriogonum ordii, also known as Ord's buckwheat or Desert buckwheat, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Eriogonum ordii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Eriogonum ordii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in topical applications, such as salves and creams.
